query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cost_learning_records (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  claim_id INT NOT NULL,
  tenant_id VARCHAR(255),
  vehicle_descriptor VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  collision_direction VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  market_region VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DEFAULT',
  case_signature VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  component_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  structural_component_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  final_cost_usd_cents INT,
  cost_is_agreed TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  quote_coverage_ratio_pct INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  high_cost_drivers_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  component_weighting_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  component_detail_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  quality_flags_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  recorded_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (id),
  INDEX idx_clr_claim_id (claim_id),
  INDEX idx_clr_tenant_id (tenant_id),
  INDEX idx_clr_case_signature (case_signature),
  INDEX idx_clr_vehicle_descriptor (vehicle_descriptor),
  INDEX idx_clr_collision_direction (collision_direction),
  INDEX idx_clr_recorded_at (recorded_at)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cost_learning_records (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  claim_id INT NOT NULL,
  tenant_id VARCHAR(255),
  vehicle_descriptor VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  collision_direction VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  market_region VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DEFAULT',
  case_signature VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  component_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  structural_component_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  final_cost_usd_cents INT,
  cost_is_agreed TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  quote_coverage_ratio_pct INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  high_cost_drivers_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  component_weighting_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  component_detail_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  quality_flags_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  recorded_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (id),
  INDEX idx_clr_claim_id (claim_id),
  INDEX idx_clr_tenant_id (tenant_id),
  INDEX idx_clr_case_signature (case_signature),
  INDEX idx_clr_vehicle_descriptor (vehicle_descriptor),
  INDEX idx_clr_collision_direction (collision_direction),
  INDEX idx_clr_recorded_at (recorded_at)
)
